changelog:
v1.0.1.X1 — 2026-03-23

FIXED
- debug_log/ no longer created inside the install directory — five separate code paths were incorrectly placing debug_log/ under V0RTEX_vX.X.X.XX/ instead of v0rtex_utils/debug_log/. All five fixed: _setup_panic, _REQUIRED_DIRS, in-app updater, Recovery Selective Regen, _run_silent_update_ui.

v1.0.1.X0 — 2026-03-23

CHANGED
- Trampoline logic moved from v0rtex.py to v0rtex_adapter.py. The --trampoline-update block (369 lines) removed from v0rtex.py. Adapter now owns the full update chain.
- v0rtex_adapter.py is now self-updating: fetches its own latest version before starting the splash UI, relaunches if newer.
- Trampoline loop integrated into adapter: fetches compat_map.json, installs each intermediate version silently until one hop before target, then runs normal 6-step pipeline.
- V0RTEX acronym updated: V=Vulnerability O=Oriented R=Recon T=Threat E=Exploitation X=eXaminer.

v1.0.0.X0 — 2026-03-23

ADDED
- v0rtex_adapter.py post-update adapter with 6-step pipeline and live splash UI.
- NET: Proxy, Tor, Noise Gen, Live Traffic, Conn Stats, Ping tabs.
- IOC: IMPHASH tab. LOOK: FUZZY, BINPAT tabs.
- CFG: UPDATE LOG tab. SET: PRIVACY tab. HOME: README sub-tab.
- Log censor system with per-category rules and Temp_Log_Storage.
- Crash hooks: _early_crash_hook, _vx_debug_excepthook, _tk_callback_exception_handler.
- Emergency rollback button in PROT > BACKUP.
- PROT > System Check: FULL SCAN sub-tab.

FIXED
- Tkinter callback exceptions now routed to crash handler.
- Cold-start performance improved via deferred tab init.
